• Implements a full‑screen mining game with procedural terrain, player stats, and admin host election.
  • Features custom UI elements: beveled buttons, modals, minimap, HUD gauges, mobile controls, and a settings panel.
  • Includes networking (MQTT), sound engine, save system, cloud sync, and a shop for upgrades and consumables.
    Game.init()
    Shop.buy('drill')
    Sound.playTimerBlip(urgency)

This HTML page creates a rich, canvas‑driven game where the player mines, builds, trades, and upgrades a vehicle while exploring a procedurally generated world. It handles single‑player and multiplayer modes, provides responsive mobile controls, and offers persistence through local and cloud saves.
